description: Leading design engineering and development of developer dashboard tools, focusing on speed, analytics, and responsive design systems.
bullets: Refactored high-traffic pages, dropping Core Web Vitals LCP by 400ms globally.

description: Maintained and optimized the issue tracking board interface with a focus on keyboard-first navigation and custom canvas components.

Implemented advanced keyboard shortcut engine to allow full app navigation without touching the trackpad.
Reduced CSS and script bundle overhead by 35% through precise Webpack and rollup modifications.

description: Contributed to frontend tooling and standard UI component libraries inside the Stripe checkout integration team.
